intentAndPurpose.intent: Icon-only call-to-action sharing the Button family state model. Three variants (bold / subtle / ghost), 9 appearances + auto, six f-step sizes (4/6/8/10/12/14). `aria-label` is mandatory â€” it is the sole accessible name. Adapts on coloured surfaces via the parent <Surface> cascade.

props.name: icon
props.description: SemanticIconName string, a JDS <Icon> element, or an IconComponent. Never a raw <Svg>. â€” [warn] Pass an icon registry name (e.g. icon="close") or a JDS <Icon>; a bare <Svg> ignores the surface-resolved colour + size.

props.name: attention
props.description: Figma alias â†’ variant (highâ†’bold, mediumâ†’subtle, lowâ†’ghost).

props.name: size
props.description: f-step numeric size; t-shirt aliases (2xsâ€¦xl) canonicalise to these.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role resolved against the parent <Surface>.

props.name: contained
props.description: When false, renders the bare icon (no chip / background); condensed / layout / fullWidth are ignored.

props.name: layout
props.description: Aspect ratio of the hit area. Only when contained=true.

props.name: loading
props.description: Swaps the icon for a spinner; sets accessibilityState.busy.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: REQUIRED â€” the only accessible name for this icon-only control.

props.name: aria-haspopup
props.description: boolean or one of dialog / grid / listbox / menu / tree.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. Painting via style is rejected â€” variant + appearance + surface drive the fill. â€” [warn] Use the appearance + surface system; inline paint defeats the brand cascade.

icon.description: SemanticIconName string, a JDS <Icon> element, or an IconComponent. Never a raw <Svg>.
icon.x-jds-suggestion: Pass an icon registry name (e.g. icon="close") or a JDS <Icon>; a bare <Svg> ignores the surface-resolved colour + size.
